inputs.label: Shakes
inputs.businessContext: Enter the number of shakes to convert.

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the number of shakes to convert.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie die Anzahl der Shakes zur Umrechnung ein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez le nombre de shakes à convertir.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingrese el número de shakes a convertir.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places to round the result.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places to round the result.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonucu yuvarlamak için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen zum Runden des Ergebnisses.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour arrondir le résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear el resultado.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor (ns/shake)
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion: 1 shake = 10 nanoseconds. Change if needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion: 1 shake = 10 nanoseconds. Change if needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart dönüşüm: 1 shake = 10 nanosaniye. Gerekirse değiştirin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardumrechnung: 1 Shake = 10 Nanosekunden. Bei Bedarf ändern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Conversion standard : 1 shake = 10 nanosecondes. Modifiez si nécessaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Conversión estándar: 1 shake = 10 nanosegundos. Cambiar si es necesario.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التحويل القياسي: 1 شيكة = 10 نانو ثانية. غيّر إذا لزم الأمر.

inputs.label: Output Scale Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiply the resulting nanoseconds by this factor, e.g., 1e3 for picoseconds, 1e-3 for microseconds.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiply the resulting nanoseconds by this factor, e.g., 1e3 for picoseconds, 1e-3 for microseconds.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortaya çıkan nanosaniyeyi bu faktörle çarpın, örn. pikosaniye için 1e3, mikrosaniye için 1e-3.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplizieren Sie die resultierenden Nanosekunden mit diesem Faktor, z. B. 1e3 für Pikosekunden, 1e-3 für Mikrosekunden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multipliez les nanosecondes résultantes par ce facteur, par ex. 1e3 pour des picosecondes, 1e-3 pour des microsecondes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplique los nanosegundos resultantes por este factor, p. ej., 1e3 para picosegundos, 1e-3 para microsegundos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اضرب الناتج بالنانو ثانية بهذا العامل، مثلاً 1e3 للبيكو ثانية، 1e-3 للميكرو ثانية.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
